_comments.control: Required. Control run ID; used to match model files like {data_root}/{control}_*_srf_t0_{site}.nc and {data_root}/{control}_*_z_t0_{site}.nc
_comments.experiment: Required. Experiment run ID; same file patterns as control
_comments.start: Required. Inclusive start time (ISO-like string). Used to slice both model and obs data.
_comments.end: Required. Inclusive end time (ISO-like string). Used to slice both model and obs data.
_comments.site: Required. Must be a key in scripts/sites.json
_comments.data_root: Required. Folder containing model NetCDF files for control/experiment.
_comments.dir_obs: Required. Folder containing observation subfolders/files as configured in scripts/sites.json.
_comments.fig_dir: Optional. Output directory for PNGs. If relative, it is resolved relative to the repo root.
_comments.out: Optional. If set, writes the score table to this path (.csv or .json). Other extensions default to CSV.
_comments.daytime: Optional. [start_hour, end_hour) in local hour-of-day, default [7, 20].
_comments.nighttime: Optional. [start_hour, end_hour) in local hour-of-day, default [20, 7] (wraps over midnight).
_comments.stream/mars_type/time/mars_margin_deg/st: Currently ignored by scripts/compute_scorecard.py (will be needed once the tool allows for mars extraction).
